description_long: This object is a freestanding advertising pennant with a vertical metal pole anchored into a flat, square base. The pennant flag is made of a lightweight fabric, shaped in a teardrop or feather style, and is attached along the length of the pole, curving outward at the top. The flag displays a modern design with diagonal stripes and the word 'LOGO' prominently printed in blue, suggesting it is intended for customizable branding. The base appears to be made of a heavy material, likely metal or concrete, to provide stability in outdoor urban environments. The pole is slender and metallic, supporting the flag at full height. The overall construction is typical for promotional signage used on sidewalks, plazas, or event spaces.
description: A freestanding feather-shaped advertising pennant with a metal pole, square base, and a fabric flag displaying a modern 'LOGO' design. The object is designed for outdoor urban promotional use.
description_view_0: A direct side view showing the thin profile of the pole and base, with the flag barely visible.
description_view_1: A front angled view highlighting the full pennant flag, visible 'LOGO' text, and the curved shape of the flag.
description_view_2: A rear view showing the straight pole and base, with the flag's back side visible but without any text or graphics.
description_view_3: A back angled view displaying the plain reverse side of the flag and the supporting pole, with the flag's curve evident.
attribute_graphic_design: The pennant features diagonal light gray stripes and a bold blue 'LOGO' text on a gray background. The design is simple and modern, intended for branding or advertising.
